nasb.text: Moreover, he built cities in the hill country of Judah, and he built fortresses and towers on the wooded hills.

esv.text: Moreover, he built cities in the hill country of Judah, and forts and towers on the wooded hills.

cnv.text: 他在猶大山地建造城市，又在樹林中建造一些營寨和瞭望樓。

ccb.text: 他还在犹大山区建造城邑，在树林中建造营寨和瞭望塔。
